textByHashes.385b8da43e77b96ae727bfeb691041d91ac2874f: My children! Someone help me find my children!
textByHashes.31e080a7a649cc8cf43e4a56ffea546d8622d474: My children are hiding in there! Please find them! Please save them!
textByHashes.2659580e79e51fc581860501e5f49e43642f9083: Those children are nothing but trouble - if I did not watch them all the time, Seren knows what trouble they would get in to!
textByHashes.5d387e64a00ddb4111888a5850807d5c62132072: They are only 34 and 38, far too young to be left unsupervised.
textByHashes.a096a951c57eedcfbd7ab3b646cc69e8e8899ed4: Has no one told you it is rude to ask a lady her age?
textByHashes.c8de47ffeb836dbbc57f020e1156bb0b0cbeaa7b: Okay, See you some other time.
textByHashes.ab1cf7ff7209fa8700d7a6157acb3a47e300b0ce: I can't thank you enough for what you did. My children might be dead if not for you.
textByHashes.80cf2f1e6eb582e824a2c8ebda23a37457a738f5: You're a hero and all of us here know it. Again, thank you.
textByHashes.b6c80781491679d704f2572a1ed6b7b7749511b6: What do you think you're doing?
